heading: Contracts and grants for determination of unmet health care needs
label: 1654 Contracts and grants for determination of unmet health care needs
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1654, , , ; , , , related to other contract requirements, prior to the general revision of this subchapter by .Pub. L. 94–437, title V, § 50490 Stat. 1411Pub. L. 96–537, § 794 Stat. 3178Pub. L. 100–713Sept. 30, 1976Dec. 17, 1980

(a) which read as follows: “Under authority of , the Secretary, through the Service, may enter into contracts with urban Indian organizations situated in urban centers for which contracts have not been entered into under . The purpose of a contract under this section shall be the determination of the matters described in subsection (b)(1) of this section in order to assist the Secretary in assessing the health status and health care needs of urban Indians in the urban center involved and determining whether the Secretary should enter into a contract under with the urban Indian organization with which the Secretary has entered into a contract under this section.”Pub. children.heading: Authority
children.label: a Authority
children.text: Under authority of , the Secretary, through the Service, may enter into contracts with, or make grants to, urban Indian organizations situated in urban centers for which contracts have not been entered into, or grants have not been made, under . The purpose of a contract or grant made under this section shall be the determination of the matters described in subsection (b)(1) in order to assist the Secretary in assessing the health status and health care needs of urban Indians in the urban center involved and determining whether the Secretary should enter into a contract or make a grant under with respect to the urban Indian organization which the Secretary has entered into a contract with, or made a grant to, under this section.section 13 of this titlesection 1653 of this titlesection 1653 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: document the health care status and unmet health care needs of urban Indians in the urban center involved; and

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to urban Indians in the urban center involved, determine the matters described in clauses (2), (3), (4), and (8) of ; andsection 1653(b) of this title

the urban Indian organization complete performance of the contract, or carry out the requirements of the grant, within one year after the date on which the Secretary and such organization enter into such contract, or within one year after such organization receives such grant, whichever is applicable.

children.heading: Renewal
children.label: c Renewal
children.text: The Secretary may not renew any contract entered into, or grant made, under this section.
